name: Rider App
description: The passenger-facing mobile app for booking, tracking, and managing rides.

name: Driver App
description: The driver-facing mobile application used for accepting rides and managing earnings.

name: Cuorium Admin Panel
description: Web-based administration panel for managing bookings, drivers, and customers.

name: Booking API
description: Public API responsible for creating, updating, and tracking ride bookings across all systems.

name: Analytics Dashboard
description: Internal reporting dashboard for monitoring fleet performance, booking trends, and revenue KPIs.

name: Legacy B2B Portal
description: Deprecated business-to-business booking portal for corporate clients, kept for historical data validation.
